cooperates.cooperate_desc: Having a wide Stun and Wide continuous range of damage that burst enemies all together sounds incredibly good for you and bad for enemies.
Wide Stun along with Continous damage sounds like a nuisance for enemy but good synergy for your ally.
Your aim is to protect at all cost. Stun and Poke enemy which saves time for Fredrin to recover and prevent him from being stunned all together.
Same as Fredrin's: Your aim is to protect at all cost. Stun and Poke enemy which saves time for recover and prevention from being stunned all together.
You stun the enemy, Joy comes and burst them down. It compensate for Joy's lack of crowd control and to prevent enemies from escaping.
Continues damage, hard escape, and fast burst. You stun the enemy, Ling will finish the job.
Good combination, but lacks AOE burst capability.
You stun the enemy long enough, Freya will come swoop by and chip those HP down in a few hits.
It's very effective if your ally Fanny knows how to use the stun to burst the enemies down.
Your stun act as a poke to chip enemies' HP. Giving chance for Karina to finish it with her fast, precise skills and massive damage.
You stun the enemy, she comes in with a second stun. It's not enough to kill them all at once, but gives enough time for allies to respond.
Great help to compensate for Aurora's lack of mobility.
Two Icy Heroes together. Enemies are good as Ice once you successfully conceived a combo together.
Makes you easily burst enemy down, locking them in place, and prevent them from escaping.
Good if you're up against mobility heroes with dashes. Especially assassins. Gives you the chance to lock them down.
Tigreal charges, you follow. Same as Atlas. Double stun and Burst damage is dangerous.
Makes you easily stun enemies with increased hitbox. Also makes the map safer because of Novaria's visions.
Having Stun and Burst is an insane combo, and Sora is the hero for that. Locking enemies in place makes a allies respond faster.
Makes You Zhong a menace. Helping him stack passive faster and chip down enemies.
Same as You Zhong. You lock enemies in place, he do the Burst.

counters.counter_desc: Since Aurora rely on ranged attacks. Lukas is a nightmare for Aurora, having control immunity just makes it harder.
Can closed the gap to Aurora and stun removal. Wanwan can easily take down Aurora.
Just make sure Hanabi has no barrier/shield left. You can easily take her down, or else she'll have immune immunity.
Prevent Joy from dashing or moving once Ultimate is activated, or else she'll be the one to eliminate you.
Once Barats has his passive stacked, along with the right equipment. Aurora is completely useless against him.
A lock damage. It makes Aurora hopeless against attacks without assistant from others.
Make sure you have Flicker ready, or someone to share damage with. Hayabusa can easily escape once he burst you down.
This Hero is Aurora's nightmare. Can easily counter your skills, rendering you useless.
Long range fight is not Aurora's specialty.
Share to catch, slightly longer range than Aurora, and stun and poke ability that can be irritating.
Another long range Mage that makes Aurora vulnerable. You can still put in a fight if you managed to get close to Cecilion.
Can easily get closed to Aurora with Kadita's control immunity and have insane burst.
Hard to catch, can easily escape your stun, and insane continuous damage.
Unpredictable, stun removal, long range. Can give Aurora a hard battle.
Unpredictable and target lock capability. A Midlaner that closes the gap and burst capability is Aurora's bad match against.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Follow your Jungler to their first target, make sure to have your First skill and dump it to the creep to help them with their Jungling.

Make sure to keep your distance from your opposing enemy. You can also Poke-bully them if you are confident enough at least.

Rotate to any other lane that struggles against their enemy. Especially Gold if necessary.

Always assist your Jungle with the turtle. You should have your ultimate ready by then.

Position yourself at the middle between your enemies and allies. Use your stuns especially to the enemy Jungler; note that you should still have your passive and flicker ready.

This is the time where you are the dominator of the fight, you have the stun and damag,  and set that enemy roamers still leveling up for.

Be alert of the EXP laners.
This is the time where you should rotate frequently to other lane. As a Mage. You're the second roamer of the team.

Be present to contest lord of your team can. Always make use of your ultimate at times where the enemy lord is at a low HP. This Ensures the core will be stunned, along with other enemies to try and secure the lord.

Your build should be maxed out. Join teamfights. Protect your teammates when chased. Stun and Poke and Damage all you can. Enemies are typically are scared of Aurora this state of the game ba use of the Stun.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Personally, this is my emblem. 

- l recommend Rupture for it provides Magic Penetration to not worry about enemies' Magic defense much.

- You can use Wilderness Blessing to rotate around the map faster.

- Impure Rage for extra damage and mana recovery.

This is my build when I use Aurora as a roamer.

- Inspire for cooldown and mana recovery.

- Wilderness Blessing for rotation.

- Impure Rage for extra damage and mana recovery.

If you're into burst and long stun Aurora, this build is for you.

- Thrill for more Magic Power due to its Adaptivity. Can still be change to Rupture if you want to have magic penetration.

- Weapons Master to accumulate more Magic Power from Emblems, Equipment, and Talents. Or change to Master Assassin if you want to burst while relying on Ambushing enemies.

- Lethal Ignition for damage overtime after bursting an enemy. Or change to Impure Rage for extra damage and mana recovery.

equips.equip_desc:
This set works best if you want to easily kill your enemies and stun them for 5-8seconds long. Easily rivaling a Tank's stun.

- Make sure to be aware of the high skill cooldown. You could always sell the boots in the late game for another Holy Crystal.

- You can also change Blood Wings for Winter Truncheon or Immortality once you lost your passive.

If you are more onto Poking and Damaging your enemies for your teammates. This build work wonders if you use it right. It has capability to spam Poke and Stun acting like a Tank-setter but a bit squishy.
Since many heroes nowadays are mostly Sustain and Healers. This build make sure those pesky heroes do not benefit much to recovery.

hero.hero_overview:
As an Aurora user, I found myself rather drawn to this Ice Queen. She is severely underrated and underestimated.

Having great Damage and Control skills but lack Mobility typically make this mage more susceptible to deaths but grands insane comeback capability with its Passive allowing Aurora to restore a moderate amount of HP to try outplay the enemy.
hero.hero_strength: Having burst potential, enemy poking, and ridiculous arount of stun that rivals tanks. She is great for targeting backlane heroes with her range-stun skills—effectively on Marksman, Mages, and Support.
hero.hero_weakness: Her skills have such high cooldown makes her hard to have a proper fight with her opposing enemy in lane. Not to mention her skill relies on ranged attack which make her very vulnerable to melee heroes—often making her activate her passive unfortunately.

data.recommend: Aurora relies on Magic Power for longer stun, and distance to properly use her in matches. Take advantage of her passive to make a last resort outplay or to escape.

spell.spell_desc: I recommend Flicker to balance her lack of mobility. It also provide great counter and outplay capability—for easy distance from melee heroes and gapping close with long range heroes since her skills are medium range at best.

data.title: How to dominate with the Ice Queen; Aurora

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on clearing waves using Skill 1. Use Skill 2 to poke the enemy mid-laner, but don't overextend. Use the "freeze turret" mechanic to help your jungler dive if they gank your lane.
Rotate with your Tank/Roamer. Hide in bushes and wait for enemies to group up. Your job is to provide the CC "set" for your team to follow up on.
Stay behind your frontline. A well-timed Ultimate can freeze the entire enemy team for nearly 2 seconds. Protect your Marksman with Skill 2 if they get dove by assassins.

Yue's secret isn't just the items, it's the "Bush Bait." He often waits in high-traffic bushes, using Skill 2 (the fan-shaped freeze) to catch an enemy, followed immediately by the Ultimate and Skill 1. If you are being dove by an assassin, Yue relies on Aurora's Pride of Ice (Passive) and Flicker to reposition and counter-initiate.

emblems.emblem_desc:
🧊RUPTURE (Tier 1): 
-Increases Adaptive Penetration to ensure your early-game poke hurts.

🧊WEAPONS MASTER (Tier 2): 
- Increases Magic Power gained from items by 5%. This is vital because your freeze duration scales with Magic Power.

🧊LETHAL IGNITION (Tier 3): 
-Dealing damage greater than 7% of target's max HP 3 times burns them. Great for finishing off targets after a combo.
emblems.emblem_title: MAGE EMBLEM (for Magic Power and Penetration)

equips.equip_desc:
[ ARCANE BOOTS ]
- Provides early Magic Penetration.

[ LIGHTNING TRUNCHEON ]
- Core for burst damage and Cooldown Reduction.

[ WISHING LANTERN ]
- Excellent against tanks; deals damage based on enemy Max HP.

[ HOLY CRYSTAL ]
-Massive Magic Power boost to increase freeze duration.

[ DIVINE GLAIVE ]
-To shred through enemy Magic Defense in the late game.

[ BLOOD WINGS ]
-Provides late-game shield and massive Magic Power.

[ ARCANE BOOTS ]:
-For early-game Magic Penetration.

[ LIGHTNING TRUNCHEON ]:
-Essential for the burst damage that scales with Magic Power.

[ GENIUS WAND ]:
-To reduce enemy Magic Defense, especially effective against squishy targets.

[ HOLY CRYSTAL ]:
-Provides a massive spike in Magic Power for the mid-to-late game.

[ DIVINE GLAIVE]: 
-Necessary to pierce through Magic Defense items like Athena's Shield.

[ BLOOD WINGS ]: 
-For maximum damage and a significant shield for survivability.

💡Pro Tip: In some matches, Yue swaps an offensive item for FLEETING TIME if his team needs more frequent crowd control from his Ultimate, or WINTER CROWN if he is being targeted heavily.

hero.hero_overview:
Known as the Maiden of the Glacier, Aurora is a powerful Mage from the Northern Vale. She is #36 hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB). As of 2026, Aurora has solidified her spot as a top-tier control mage. Following her significant rework, she transitioned from a "one-shot" bush camper to a utility-heavy team fighter with unmatched crowd control (CC). Unlike other mages, her CC scales with her Magic Power, making her deadlier as the game progresses.


[ HERO SKILLS ] 

🧊 PASSIVE SKILL (PRIDE OF ICE): Upon taking fatal damage, Aurora freezes herself for 1.5s, becoming invincible and recovering 30% HP. This makes her incredibly hard to dive.

🧊SKILL 1 (HAILSTONE BLAST): Summons a meteorite followed by 5 hailstones. Perfect for wave clear and poking.

🧊SKILL 2 (FROSTY BREEZE): Blows a fan-shaped icy wind. Enemies at the far end are frozen for 1 second.

🧊ULTIMATE (FRIGID GLAZIER): Aurora creates a path of frost that explodes into a glacier. It freezes enemies for 1 second  (duration increases by 0.2s for every 100 Magic Power).


[ HERO SKILL COMBOS ]:

🥶 Team Fight (2-3-1): 
Skill 2 (Freeze) > Ultimate (Mass Freeze) > Skill 1 (Burst).

🥶The Finisher (3-2-1): 
Ultimate (Slow/Freeze) > Skill 2 (Chain CC) > Skill 1.
hero.hero_strength:
🧊Unmatched CC: She can freeze multiple enemies and even Turrets, allowing for safe dives.

🧊Survival: Her passive is essentially a "built-in" Winter Truncheon/Immortality.

🧊Late Game Scaling: Her freeze duration grows longer as she gains more Magic Power.
hero.hero_weakness:
🧊High Cooldowns: She is vulnerable once her skills are on cooldown.

🧊Delayed Skills: Her Ultimate and Skill 1 have a slight delay; mobile heroes can dash out of them.

🧊Mana Hungry: Requires mana management items in the early game.

data.recommend: A Complete Guide on how to play like a Pro Player YUE (Aurora PH) using Aurora

spell.spell_desc:
💡FLICKER (Best choice): Essential for escaping or repositioning to land the perfect 5-man Ultimate.



ALTERNATIVE BATTLE SPELL: 

FLAMESHOT: Useful for extra poke and finishing off low-HP enemies from a distance.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Atlas pulls the entire team into a single point, allowing Aurora to freeze all five enemies with one Skill 2.
His Implosion setup ensures Aurora's slow-casting Ultimate hits the maximum number of targets.

counters.counter_desc: His "Invincibility" frames allow him to dodge Aurora's entire combo, leaving her defenseless.
Her crowd-control immunity during her dashes can bypass Aurora's freezing effects entirely.
She need to huddle for heals makes them perfect targets for Aurora's massive AoE freeze.
He need to huddle for heals makes them perfect targets for Aurora's massive AoE freeze.
His high HP is negated by your Wishing Lantern and constant freezes that stop his movement.

dominants.dominant_desc: Her true dominance begins once she completes Enchanted Talisman and Wishing Lantern. Aurora requires Magic Power to scale her freeze duration. In the mid-game, her cooldowns become low enough to spam CC, and her Ultimate gains the necessary strength to freeze enemies (and turrets) long enough for a total team wipe. By the late game, with Holy Crystal and Blood Wings, she becomes an immovable fortress of ice that can dictate the flow of every major objective fight.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Tier 1: Thrill — Increases Magic Power to enhance early-game poke damage.
Tier 2: Wilderness Blessing — Grants bonus movement speed in the river/jungle to help this immobile mage rotate for ganks.
Tier 3: Lethal Ignition — Aurora's multi-hit combo (2-Ult-1) triggers this burn instantly, ensuring high-HP targets don't escape with a sliver of health.

equips.equip_desc: The Frostbite Protocol build is essential for the 2026 Aurora because it transitions her from a simple "single-shot" mage into a sustained CC powerhouse. By prioritizing Enchanted Talisman and Wishing Lantern, you solve her mana-hungry nature while gaining the ability to melt high-HP frontliners through multi-hit %HP damage during her revamped Ultimate. The inclusion of Holy Crystal and Blood Wings ensures that her freeze duration scales to its maximum length, allowing you to lock down entire teams and even disable Turrets for aggressive dives. This build guarantees that you aren't just slowing enemies, but effectively removing them from the match through a lethal combination of infinite ability uptime and un-counterable magic penetration.

hero.hero_overview: Aurora is the Northern Vale's ultimate crowd-control strategist. Her revamped mechanics have shifted her from a simple "single-target burst" mage to a CC-Support Specialist capable of controlling massive teamfights with AoE freeze effects. While she can still dish out heavy damage, her primary role in 2026 is managing space and grounding high-mobility threats.
hero.hero_strength: Aurora possesses unmatched Glacial Control potential. Her Passive (Pride of Ice) acts as a built-in "second life," freezing herself when fatal damage is taken to regain HP and reposition. Her Skill 2 provides instant AoE freezing, while her Ultimate can now freeze enemy Turrets, making her the premier choice for aggressive diving and objective control.
hero.hero_weakness: Despite her "ice shield" passive, Aurora remains extremely immobile and vulnerable to being out-ranged by artillery mages. She lacks a natural dash, making her a "sitting duck" for long-range poke or assassins if her Flicker is on cooldown.

data.recommend: Freeze the 2026 meta! Use the Frostbite Protocol to lock down teams, shut down turrets, and melt tanks with infinite CC. Put the game on ice!

spell.spell_desc: Essential for repositioning her stationary Ultimate or escaping after her passive triggers.

data.title: Glacial Epoch: Mastering the 2026 Aurora Revamp

hero.hero_overview: Aurora is a burst-control mage who excels at freezing enemies and dominating team fights with area crowd control. After her revamp, Aurora has become more consistent in applying freeze stacks and offers stronger presence in mid and late game. She specializes in zoning, team fight disruption, and punishing grouped enemies. With proper positioning and timing, Aurora can completely shut down enemy engages and secure objectives through crowd control and burst damage.
hero.hero_strength:
Strong area-of-effect crowd control with freeze mechanics
 High burst damage when freeze is triggered
 Excellent team fight control and zoning ability
 Scales well into mid and late game
 Very effective against melee heroes and grouped enemies
 Can control objectives (Lord/Turtle) with ultimate zoning
 Strong synergy with tank initiators and setup heroes
hero.hero_weakness:
Weak early game damage and slow rotations
 Highly dependent on freeze stacks management
Low mobility, easy target for assassins
Requires good positioning and timing
Vulnerable when skills are on cooldown
Struggles against high-mobility burst heroes

cooperates.cooperate_desc: تتوافق ليليا مع اورورا انه يمكنها تجديد تقاط الحياة او تجميدها لمدة معينة  .محدودة في تلقي الضرر من الاعداء

counters.counter_desc: يمكنهما تثبيت العديد من الاعداء واحداث ضرراً كبيراً عليهم ومداهما كبير وبعيدا  .يمكن احداث ذلك الضرر كله على نحو بعيد جدا
بإمكانهما تثبيت الاعداء والاقتراب منهم لإحداث ضرراً كبيراً على الاعداء ولديهم السرعة اللازمة لتحقيق ذلك الكم الهائل من الضرر على مستوى مختلف من باقي الأبطال

ويمكنهما من احداث ضرر كبير بضربةٍ واحدة على العدو وذلك عن طريق الاستعانة بالقوة الجسدية والعقلية التي تساعد على تحقيق الفوز ويمكن للبطلة اورورا ان تكون بمثابة قوة التامة او المدرع ولديها القدرة والقوة على احداث الضعف في الاعداء

dominants.dominant_desc: في بداية المعركة أو المباراة تكون البطلة اورورا ضعيفةً جداً لانها لا تملك المعدات اللازمة لذلك يجب على كل اللاعبين شراء المعدات المطلوبة حتى تتمكن من احداث المزيد اواحراز المزيد من الضرر وخصوصاً في أواخر المباريات لانها ستسبب الكثير من الضرر في الفريق المنافس وبالتالي فان الفريق القادر على تحقيق الفوز في هذه المباراة سيكون له تأثير قوي وكبير وبالطبع اعتماد الفريق في التشكيلة المثالية سيكون له دور كبير في تحقيق الفوز .

emblems.emblem_desc: السبب وراء اختياري لهذه الاشعارات هي انها تساعد على تقوية المهارات والمعدات الخاصة بالساحرة اورورا وهيا افضل واحدث إشعارات في هذا الموسم الجديد حتى الان موسم البطلة الجديدة ( اوبسيديا ) .

equips.equip_desc: لانها حاليا الأقوى في احداث الضرر على الاعداء في هذا الموسم اوبسيديا .
المعدات الإضافية لها تأثير قوي في نهاية المعركة أو المباراة .

hero.hero_overview: البطله اورورا قوية جدا وضررها متفجر وعندها ضرر سحري وعندها التجميد لمن جيها الضرر او لمن تتدمج او بمعنى اخر عندما تقل نقاط حياتها ولديها مدى قريب وبعيد بحيث انها يمكن ان تؤثر على الاعداء القريبين او البعيدين وغير ذلك من ضرر متتالي في الوقت ذاته اما عن معداتها فهيا مثل اي معدات ساحر لكن توجد بعض المعدات المختلفة والمخصصة لها ولكل السحره او الابطال الذين يذهبون من الطريق الأوسط ومعداتها كالتالي : ( حذاء الاختراق - صولجان الجحيم - اجنحة الدماء - عصا البصيرة - سيف الفوضى - زمردة الطبيعه ) وأما المعدات الأخرى او الاضافيه فهي كالتالي : ( تاج الشتاء - ودرع الخلود ) لأخذ كل الاحتياطات اللازمة في المعارك سواء كانت مدتها طويلة أم قصيرة وكل ذلك قد يؤدي إلى حدوث تغيرات كبيرة أو صغيرة الحجم في المعارك وطبعاً تعتمد على قوة ومتانة ومرونة ومقاومة ومهارة التيم الصحيح والصحي ومهاجمة الاعداء والفوز عليهم وبجدارة واستحقاق من خلال هذه التجربة الرائعة وهكذا هي أفضل واقوى طريقة لإستخدام البطلة الساحرة اورورا .
hero.hero_strength: يكون ضررها عالي على حسب المدى والوقت المناسب لها وسرعة اللاعب في الهجوم على الاعداء وطبعاً يعتمد على بعض الابطال الأخرين من حيث الجهوم او الابطال الذين يقومون المطورين بعمل تعديلات عليهم وتضعف المهارات في المعارك ضد البطلة اورورا او من ابطال اخرين غيرها وكذلك هناك بعض المعدات التي يمكن استخدامها على الاعداء لتضعفهم وتزيد قوة الضرر العادي او الجسدي وهذه المعدة هي : ( صولجان الجحيم ) ولأن هذه المعدة ترتيب خاص بها ويطلق عليها : ( الانتي هيل ) وذلك يعني ان يكون لديها وقت إضافي لعدم تعرضها لأي ضرر من قبل الاعداء وتظهر قوتها الحقيقية في نهاية المعارك لصالح فريقها وليس لصالح الفريق المنافس لها .
hero.hero_weakness: تتكون نقطة ضعف هذه البطلة التي تسمى : ( اورورا ) في الابطال التي لا تستطيع ان تحدث فيهم ضرراً كبيراً بسبب ضعف القوة لديها او لتلقيها بعض التعديلات من المطورين على مهاراتها وغالباً عدم قدرتها على احداث التغيير أو احداث ذلك الضرر في بداية المعركه او المباراة وهذا هو السبب الرئيسي وراء عدم الفوز في المباريات وخاصةً لتلقيها لتلك التعديلات سيكون من السهل على العدو الفوز في المباراة ودعم الأبطال التي لا تستطيع مواجهتهم او تسبب ذلك الضرر حتى لو استخدم اللاعب بعض المعدات اللازمة او الخاصةِ عليها للاسف الشديد .

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Atlas uses his special skill and paralyzes the enemy and gathers them in one area. At that moment, Aurora performs the combo, which is freezing them with the second skill, then the special skill, then the first skill, and they can eliminate the enemy easily.

dominants.dominant_desc:
1. **Keep Passive Stacked:** Ensure your freeze effect is ready before engaging for maximum crowd control.  
2. **Position Safely:** Stay in the backline to avoid getting caught by assassins.  
3. **Target High-Damage Enemies:** Freeze and burst down marksmen or assassins to weaken the enemy team.  
4. **Use Ultimate Wisely:** Aim for multiple enemies instead of a single target to maximize impact.  
5. **Be Aware of Enemy Positioning:** Avoid overextending, as Aurora lacks escape abilities.  
6. **Coordinate with Your Team:** Sync your freeze with other crowd control skills for better team fights.

emblems.emblem_desc: This setup helps Aurora deal higher burst damage while ensuring she can cast her skills more frequently.
emblems.emblem_title: The best emblem for Aurora is the **Mage Emblem**.

equips.equip_desc: To help Aurora surprise the enemy and penetrate his magical defense.

hero.hero_overview:
**Hero Overview**  
Aurora is a powerful mage  who relies on her ice abilities to freeze enemies and deal massive magic damage. She plays a crucial role in controlling the battlefield, making her highly effective in team fights. Proper positioning and smart strategy are essential to maximize her potenti
hero.hero_strength:
Hero Strength
Aurora excels in crowd control with her freezing abilities, giving her team a significant advantage in battles. She deals high magic damage, especially when chaining her skills effectively. Her freezing effect makes her great for ambushing enemies and stopping their advances.
hero.hero_weakness:
Hero Weakness
Aurora has low defense, making her vulnerable to fast enemies like assassins. She also lacks escape skills, meaning poor positioning can be fatal. Additionally, she heavily relies on mana, and once it runs out, her effectiveness in combat decreases significantly.

hero.hero_overview: Aurora is a Mage hero known for her powerful burst magic damage and crowd control abilities. She specializes in freezing her enemies with her passive skill, which can immobilize opponents and provide strong team-fighting potential. Her ultimate, "Cold Destruction," deals massive area-of-effect damage and is especially effective in team fights.
hero.hero_strength: Aurora's main strengths lies on crowd control and burst damage. Her passive makes enemies freeze for a duration of time which can help in tea fight. She can zone enemies effectivley and poke in long range.
hero.hero_weakness: Aurora is quite vulnerable due to her low mobility.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Battle Stage - Early Game (Level 1-4)

Tips dan Strategi:
Gunakan skill 2 (Bitter Frost) untuk poke damage sambil mengisi pasif Pride of Ice. Manfaatkan skill ultimate (Frigid Glacier) untuk membekukan lawan atau bahkan turret musuh jika ada kesempatan menyerang. Prioritaskan clear wave dan kontrol area.

Laning Precautions:
Jangan terlalu agresif karena cooldown skill Aurora cukup lama. Perhatikan minimap untuk menghindari gank dan fokus menjaga jarak aman dari musuh.

Team Fight Strategies:
Gunakan skill ultimate dengan tepat untuk memberikan kontrol area maksimal. Fokus membekukan musuh prioritas seperti marksman atau mage musuh.



---

Battle Stage - Mid Game (Level 5-10)

Tips dan Strategi:
Mulai lakukan rotasi untuk membantu team fight di lane lain. Manfaatkan poke damage dari skill Aurora untuk melemahkan formasi musuh sebelum pertarungan dimulai.

Laning Precautions:
Selalu bersama tim, karena Aurora mudah diincar jika terpisah. Perhatikan posisi untuk menghindari inisiasi dari musuh.

Team Fight Strategies:
Kombinasikan ultimate dengan inisiasi hero tim seperti Tigreal atau Atlas untuk membekukan lebih banyak musuh. Pastikan memanfaatkan pasif pada momen penting.



---

Battle Stage - Late Game (Level 11 ke atas)

Tips dan Strategi:
Fokus bermain bersama tim untuk memenangkan team fight besar. Ultimate Aurora kini mampu membekukan turret, jadi manfaatkan ini untuk mengamankan push lane atau objektif besar.

Laning Precautions:
Jangan split push sendiri. Selalu bergerak bersama tim untuk memberikan CC di momen penting.

Team Fight Strategies:
Gunakan ultimate untuk mengontrol area dan hentikan core musuh. Targetkan carry musuh yang memiliki damage besar, seperti marksman atau mage lawan.

emblems.emblem_desc: Talent ini untu memberikan memaksimalkan damage aurora dan mempercepat rotasi

equips.equip_desc: Build ini dirancang untuk memaksimalkan burst damage Aurora sekaligus memberikan sustain dalam team fight. Arcane Boots digunakan untuk meningkatkan Magic Penetration agar skill lebih efektif melawan hero dengan Magic Defense tinggi. Glowing Wand memberikan efek burn, sangat efektif melawan hero berdarah tebal. Wishing Lantern menambah Magic Power besar dan cooldown reduction untuk spam skill. Blood Wings memberikan Magic Power tertinggi sekaligus shield tambahan untuk meningkatkan daya tahan Aurora. Divine Glaive memperkuat damage di late game dengan Magic Penetration besar, sedangkan Winter Crown menambah efek crowd control untuk memperkuat kemampuan CC Aurora sekaligus memberikan durabilitas.

hero.hero_overview: Aurora adalah Mage dengan spesialisasi Crowd Control dan Burst Damage. Hero ini sangat efektif dalam team fight berkat kemampuan membekukan musuh dan memberikan damage besar secara area.

data.recommend: Panduan lengkap untuk memaksimalkan potensi hero Aurora setelah revamp! Berisi strategi laning, build terbaik, dan tips team fight agar Anda bisa mendominasi permainan dengan kontrol area dan kekuatan

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Dapat membekukan seluruh musuh dengan kombo dari ulti atau skill 2 nya dengan bantuan dari ulti atlas.

counters.counter_desc: Aurora tidak dapat membekukan dari jarak yang dekat dan cuba untuk mengelak dari berseorangan.

dominants.dominant_desc: Dapatkan ulti terlebih dahulu semasa early game untuk dapat stun musih dengan lebih lama dan sentiasa dalam pasukan untuk elak dari kadar kematian.
dominants.dominant_title: Cuba fokus untuk dapatkan ulti dan sentiasa dalam pasukan

emblems.emblem_desc: Boleh dikombo beberapa kali setelah menggunakan ulti dengan teknik lain.

equips.equip_desc: Mematikan musuh dengan hanya sekali kombo.

hero.hero_overview: Hero yang mempunyai abiliti dan crowd control yang tinggi. Menyerang musih secara berpasukan.
hero.hero_strength: Mempunyai damage yang mematikan dan mengejutkan. Mampu membuat musuh membeku dengan masa yang lama.
hero.hero_weakness: Pasif yang berguna tetapi agak lemah dan tidak dapat mengelak dari kematian walaupun pasif telah aktif. Teknik yang dimiliki Aurora juga tidak dapat membekukan musuh dari jarak yang dekat.

spell.spell_desc: Mampu membuat kombo yang mengejutkan dan memtikan dengan menggunakan Aurora.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: CC and Area Heroes are good for her. If you manage to do the ultimate combo with Atlas that's a win for your team
CC and Area Heroes are good for her. Enemy hard to escape this two.
CC and Area Heroes are good for her. Same with Atlas, but watch for his 2nd skill because it pushes the enemies.

counters.counter_desc: Aurora can cancel Claude's ultimate with her 2nd and 3rd skill.
All of Aurora's skills are AOE, so it good to cancel Lesley's passive and 1st skill.

dominants.dominant_desc: Pretty much just focus to clear mid until you get level 4. You can go help others once you done clearing the waves.
After level 4, go with your tank and roam around to help jungler, gold, exp, and team fight. Don't forget your mid lane after helping them. Don't just stay on mid, it's not a brawl game.

I like to stick with my tank, Aurora and tank heroes made a really good combo especially some CC Tanks, but you can also go with your marksman at late game, because they're the main damage of the team beside assassins and always targeted by the enemies. So it's good to give some back ups for them.
dominants.dominant_title: Mid to Late Game Team Fight

dominants.dominant_desc:
Always use your 2nd and 3rd skill wisely, this is your main skills, don't waste them. You can check bushes using your 1st skill, so save those two for team fight.

Prioritize your passive than your battle spell, because it has longer cooldown. So throw your battle spell to escape is better than lost your passive.

emblems.emblem_desc: I always use Wilderness Blessing for mid lane heroes, it help me do fastest rotation to help other lanes. Rupture for extra penetration is good especially for early game and Impure Rage for extra mana recovery from skills hit.

equips.equip_desc:
Key Item : Glowing Wand is good for anti-heal effects and Blood Wings for the shield & extra movement speed.

The rest are pretty much customable, just suit to your playstyle and look for enemy team composition.

hero.hero_overview: Pretty good hero for team fight.
hero.hero_strength: Hard CC for team fight, pretty good damage, also her passive really helpful.
hero.hero_weakness: The only weakness is melee heroes, especially assassins, it's hard to fight them if you don't have a good backup from your team. So always stick with someone.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Aurora lacks mobility, and her Skill 2 only freezes enemies at a certain range, while Ling can easily close the gap with his wall-running movement. When Aurora casts her Ultimate, Ling can use his Ultimate before it explodes to avoid it completely. Even if Aurora tries to Flicker away, Ling can still catch her with his multi-use mobility.

counters.counter_desc: Odette's Ultimate can't be interrupted by normal crowd control effects, but Freeze is an effect that can interrupt it. A skilled Aurora won't give Odette the chance to unleash her full Ultimate.

dominants.dominant_desc: Aurora's Skill 1 is effective for wave-clearing and poking opponents. Focus on clearing Minions and supporting teammates.

Aurora's Ultimate can easily determine the outcome of teamfights. It can turn charging enemies into ice sculptures or be used to initiate teamfights with her Skill 2 - Ultimate - Skill 1 combo that will leave your enemies frozen in awe.

emblems.emblem_desc: The Mage Emblem provides excellent attributes for Aurora. The extra Movement Speed greatly enhances Aurora's ability to help the side lanes, while Impure Rage greatly improves her poking ability.
Rupture and Lethal Ignition will enhance Aurora's burst to send your enemies back to the ice age!

equips.equip_desc: The revamped Glowing Wand provides valuable Healing Reduction for the team and fits well with the current meta of roaming with an early belt. Aurora doesn't particularly lack mana, so there's no need for a Mana Regen item. The second item, Blood Wings, is great for both following up teammates and staying alive. The Magic Defense Reduction effect on Genius Wand suits Aurora's multi-hit damage skills, and the high Magic Power provided by Holy Crystal will also increase the Freeze duration of her Ultimate.
When facing extremely tanky heroes like Hylos, the Magic Defense Reduction from Genius Wand will not be enough. Aurora will also need to rely on Wishing Lantern to supplement her damage output.

hero.hero_overview: Aurora is an excellent Mid Lane Mage, characterized by her ranged frost spells and strong control abilities. In teamfights, once her Ultimate covers the battlefield, the enemy will find themselves with nowhere to go.
hero.hero_strength: Aurora has quick wave clear and provides strong support with her powerful control abilities that shine in teamfights. By comboing her Skill 2 with her Ultimate, she can freeze the battlefield from the right position.
hero.hero_weakness: Despite Aurora's strong control abilities and survival Passive Skill, she lacks mobility and her Skill 2 can't freeze enemies who are already in close range. As a mid-range Mage, Aurora also struggles to approach enemies that outrange her.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker can greatly enhance the survivability of a Mage without mobility skills like Aurora. This Battle Spell also enables the perfect combo of Flicker into Skill 2 into Ultimate to freeze multiple enemies.

data.title: Queen of Ice and CC - Aurora Rank-Up Guide
